mapper.insert: INSERT INTO category(categoryno, name, cnt, seqno, visible, rdate) VALUES(category_seq.nextval, #{name}, #{cnt}, #{seqno}, #{visible}, sysdate)
mapper.select: SELECT categoryno, name, cnt, seqno, visible, rdate FROM category ORDER BY seqno ASC

SELECT categoryno, name, cnt, seqno, visible, rdate FROM category
WHERE UPPER(name) LIKE '%' || UPPER(#{word}) || '%'
ORDER BY seqno ASC

SELECT COUNT(*) FROM category
WHERE UPPER(name) LIKE '%' || UPPER(#{word}) || '%'
